name: HILAPIGetSignalGeneratorElapsedTime
title: HILAPIGetSignalGeneratorElapsedTime
description: Returns the elapsed time of a Signal Generator.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: The handle of the Signal Generator.

return: 0: The handle of the Signal Generator is not valid. Note: If the Signal Generator has not been started at the time of this call 0 is returned as well.

description: Gets the elapsed time of the Signal Generator:
